seoTitle: Kenebri vs Kensington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kenebri and Kensington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kenebri and Kensington.
heading: Kenebri vs Kensington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kenebri, New South Wales and Kensington, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kenebri has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Kensington (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kenebri or Kensington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kenebri has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Kensington scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kenebri scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Kensington scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kenebri or Kensington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kenebri has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
